title: Excalibur | Eternal Nether Support
description: Renewed Nether with more piglin, enderman and wither skeleton variants
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fec57136ca3c23e2f7ccb3ce38c766ab8a60205_0.webp)

This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Eternal Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-nether/versions) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**
- Redesigned all items, blocks and entities

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
- Fuzs – Creator of _Eternal Nether_

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-eternal-nether-support)
